scripts.package:macos:app: pnpm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dir --config.mac.identity=null && printf '\nPackaged: %s\n' "$PWD"/release/mac-*/*.app
scripts.package:linux:app: pnpm run build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux dir && printf '\nPackaged: %s\n' "$PWD"/release/linux-unpacked
scripts.package:windows:app: pnpm run build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win dir
scripts.validate:runtime:prebuilt: pnpm run validate:trpc && pnpm run validate:shell-boundary
scripts.validate:runtime: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate:runtime:prebuilt
scripts.package:ci:macos: NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.package:ci:linux: pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux deb --publish never
scripts.package:ci:windows: pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish never
